title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
description:
An exceptional Senior AI Engineer with 4+ years of software engineering experience and a proven track record delivering Generative AI solutions to join the Engineering Consulting team.

Key Responsibilities:
- Designing and building AI solutions: Scoping, architecting, and implementing applications powered by generative AI
- Client engagement: Understanding business problems and proposing technical solutions as a trusted advisor
- Hands-on engineering: Writing production-quality code and deploying LLM-powered features
- Cross-discipline collaboration: Partnering with cloud architects, DevOps specialists, and front-end developers
- Business development support: Contributing to proposals and sales efforts

Core Requirements:
- Experience deploying large and small language models (LLMs/SLMs) in cloud and on-premises environments
- Proficiency with prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), fine-tuning, and agentic architectures
- Python proficiency (required); Java, Scala, Rust, or R (desirable)
- LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, Google ADK)
- Cloud AI services experience (Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, Rekognition)
- Solid AWS experience; infrastructure-as-code tools preferred
- Git, GitHub/GitLab; DevOps and CI/CD experience
- SQL and NoSQL database knowledge

Desirable Qualifications:
- Classical ML and data science fundamentals
- Cloud ML services, text extraction, speech recognition, or computer vision background
- TensorFlow or PyTorch familiarity
- AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code)
- Sales and marketing support experience

100% remote since day one. Named top company for remote work by FlexJobs and Inc. Culture emphasizing autonomy, mastery, inclusion, and continuous learning.
